meta.title: Epic Games Database - egdata.app

about.title: About
about.intro: egdata.app is a community-driven website dedicated to tracking and providing information about the Epic Games Store. Similar to SteamDB for Steam, we aim to offer a comprehensive resource for users to explore changes, discover new games, and stay up-to-date with the latest happenings on the platform.
about.missionBody: Our mission is to provide transparency and insights into the Epic Games Store ecosystem. We believe that by aggregating and presenting data in an accessible way, we can empower users to make informed decisions about their gaming purchases and contribute to a better understanding of the platform.

features.trackPrices: Track game price changes and historical data
features.upcomingReleases: View upcoming releases and free game promotions
features.gameDetails: Explore game details, ratings, and user reviews
features.analyzeTrends: Analyze trends and patterns in the Epic Games Store

about.communityBody: egdata.app is built and maintained by a passionate community of gamers and developers. We welcome contributions from anyone who wants to help improve the website and make it a valuable resource for everyone. Feel free to reach out to us if you have any feedback, suggestions, or want to get involved.
about.sourceCodeIntro: All the source code for egdata.app is available on
about.notIntro: It's important to clarify that egdata.app is not:

notList.affiliated: Affiliated with Epic Games: We are an independent, community-driven project and not officially endorsed or associated with Epic Games in any way.
notList.storefront: A storefront or marketplace: We do not sell games or provide any purchasing options. Our focus is on providing information and data about the Epic Games Store.
notList.piracy: A platform for piracy or illegal activities: We strongly condemn piracy and do not provide any means to access or distribute copyrighted content illegally.

about.fairUseBody: egdata.app is committed to complying with fair use principles under copyright law. We provide information and data for informational purposes only, aiming to educate and inform the public about games available on the Epic Games Store.

fairUseFactors.nonCommercialBody: Our website is non-commercial and seeks to enhance public knowledge about Epic Games Store games.
fairUseFactors.factualBody: We primarily present factual data like game titles, release dates, and developers, which is less protected under copyright.
fairUseFactors.limitedBody: We use only the necessary amount of data to provide meaningful information without replacing the original works.
fairUseFactors.noMarketHarmBody: Our use does not negatively impact the market for the original games; rather, it may promote them through increased user interest.

about.autoTrackBody: We automatically track and update game data from publicly available sources, including the Epic Games Store. We load graphical assets directly from their servers and do not store them.
about.leakedDataBody: Any seemingly leaked data on our site originates from publicly available information on the Epic Games Store. We do not access confidential or proprietary data. Publishers are responsible for protecting their sensitive information within the
about.euDirectivesIntro: In developing our Fair Use Policy, we have taken into consideration the principles outlined in the following EU copyright directives:
about.euDirective1: Directive (EU) 2019/790 on copyright and related rights in the Digital Single Market
about.euDirective2: Questions and Answers – New EU copyright rules
about.fairUseContact: If you have questions about our Fair Use Policy or believe any content infringes on your copyright, please contact us at:

posts.coverAlt: LEGO Star Wars: The Skywalker Saga Cover Art
posts.title: Get LEGO® Star Wars™: The Skywalker Saga for FREE on Epic Games Store
posts.intro: Mark your calendars, Star Wars fans! From {{dateRange}}, you can grab the critically acclaimed {{game}} for FREE on the Epic Games Store. This game, which usually costs {{price}}, lets you relive the iconic moments of the {{saga}} with a fun LEGO twist.
posts.game: LEGO® Star Wars™: The Skywalker Saga
posts.whatToExpectBody: Developed by {{developer}} and published by {{publisher}}, this title offers a comprehensive Star Wars experience like no other. Here's what makes it a must-play:

expectList.allMovies: 🌌 {{strong}}: Relive the storylines of all nine Skywalker saga films, packed with classic LEGO humor.
expectList.characters: 🛸 {{strong}}: Control your favorite heroes and villains from the galaxy far, far away.
expectList.vehicles: 🚀 {{strong}}: Fly iconic ships like the Millennium Falcon and TIE Fighters.
expectList.planets: 🌍 {{strong}}: Travel to familiar worlds, from Tatooine to Endor, and beyond.

posts.specialBody: Since its release in {{releaseDate}}, LEGO Star Wars: The Skywalker Saga has been praised for its engaging gameplay and faithful adaptation of the Star Wars universe. With an {{metascore}} on Metacritic, critics and fans alike have highlighted its:

specialList.combat: 🕹️ {{strong}}: Lightsaber battles, blaster shootouts, and space dogfights.
specialList.charm: 🏗️ {{strong}}: Classic Star Wars humor, reimagined in LEGO's unique style.
specialList.replayability: 🤯 {{strong}}: Tons of collectibles, side missions, and hidden secrets.

posts.howToClaimBody: Getting your free copy is easy!
posts.step2: Add the game to your library.
posts.cardTitle: Don't miss this chance to embark on a LEGO-infused journey across the galaxy!
posts.cardBody: Whether you're a die-hard Star Wars fan or a newcomer, this game offers endless fun for everyone.
posts.footer: May the Force (and LEGO bricks) be with you! 🧱✨

fairUse.title: Fair Use Policy for EGData App
fairUse.section1Body: Welcome to EGData App ("we", "our", "us"). This Fair Use Policy outlines the terms under which you may use the content and data provided on our website {{siteLink}} (the "Site").
fairUse.section2Body: The content and data on EGData App are provided for informational purposes only. Our goal is to offer a comprehensive database of games (or game related data) available in the Epic Games Store for educational and reference use by the community.
fairUse.section3Body: EGData App complies with the principles of fair use under copyright law by providing information and data in a manner that benefits the public without infringing on the rights of content owners. Here are the key factors that justify our use as fair use:

section3List.purposeBody: Our website is non-commercial and aims to educate and inform the public about games available in the Epic Games Store. We provide critical information, reviews, and updates, enhancing the public's knowledge and appreciation of these games.
section3List.natureBody: The data we collect and present consists of factual information such as game titles, release dates, developers, and updates. Factual information is less protected under copyright law than creative works.
section3List.amountBody: We only use the amount of data necessary to provide meaningful and relevant information to our users. We do not reproduce entire works or provide extensive extracts that could replace the original products.
section3List.effectBody: Our use of game data does not negatively impact the market for the original games. Instead, it promotes these games by providing up-to-date information and driving user engagement and interest.

fairUse.section4Body1: Our Site automatically tracks and updates game data to ensure that the information we provide is current and accurate. This automated process involves collecting publicly available information from the Epic Games Store and other reliable sources.
fairUse.section4Body2: By keeping our database up-to-date, we ensure that users have access to the latest information about their favorite games, including new releases, updates, and changes in availability.
fairUse.section4Body3: In terms of graphical assets, we load the images from the Epic Games Store servers directly. We do not store any images on our servers.
fairUse.section5Body1: Any data that appears to be leaked on our Site comes from publicly available information provided by the Epic Games Store. We do not have access to confidential or proprietary data that is not publicly accessible. Therefore, it is the responsibility of the publishers to protect their upcoming intellectual properties (IPs), games, downloadable content (DLCs), and other sensitive information within the Epic Games Developer portal.
fairUse.section5Body2: Publishers are encouraged to ensure that sensitive information is properly secured and not inadvertently made public. EGData App cannot be held responsible for any leaked information that was obtained from publicly available sources.
fairUse.section5Body3: For more information on data protection and fair use in the European Union, please refer to the following resources:
fairUse.euDirective1: Directive (EU) 2019/790 on copyright and related rights in the Digital Single Market
fairUse.euDirective2: Questions and Answers – New EU copyright rules
fairUse.section6Body: If you have any questions about this Fair Use Policy or if you believe that any content or data on our Site infringes on your copyright, please contact us at:

clientBanner.heading: Power the {{appName}} builds database
clientBanner.subheading: Help map every Epic Games Store build
clientBanner.description: Our lightweight Windows & macOS client scans your Epic Games Launcher installs and securely uploads only the manifest files—chunk lists and metadata—to our open database. Every upload enriches the community and helps us track changes over time.
